---
title: 'Left Behind Do-Over Cast Ideas'
date: '2012-01-02T02:39:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Forefront Entertainment'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5848524605598742539'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/left-behind-do-over-dream-cast.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Forefront Entertainment/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Dream Casts'
  - 'Do-Overs'
  - 'Movies'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
Left Behind were such GREAT books and the movies first produced were SO BAD.</div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0190524/fullcredits" href="http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0190524/fullcredits" style="color: #cd4517; line-height: 1.4;">http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0190524/fullcredits</a></div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">So this is just for fun for now. We were talking about a dream cast for a real production of left behind. So this is sort of our version of Fantasy Football. There may be multiple options under characters. If you have an idea for one leave a comment. If you like one of the options leave a comment. If you didn't like the book, don't leave a comment.&nbsp;</strong></div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">But instead it's are Left Behind Dream Cast:So far it's just ideas, nothing solid.</strong></div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold;">Director/Producer staff:</strong>
</div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 18px;">
</div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/peter-jackson-6f67b2f485a8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/peter-jackson-2652517237e4.jpg" width="149" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Peter Jackson</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<div style="font-size: 13px; line-height: 18px;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div style="line-height: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Starting with the main cast...</strong></div>
</div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<div style="line-height: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Buck Williams - Reporter:</strong></div>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="line-height: 18px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leonardo-di-caprio-c69e6f36da23.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/leonardo-di-caprio-99e1b25471ff.jpg" width="143" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Leonardo DiCaprio?</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/matt-damon-893e0ae11add.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/matt-damon-519bcf1db857.jpg" width="149" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Matt Damon?</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/warren-christie-21e1df90b671.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/warren-christie-fdc97dd040ad.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Warren Christie</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/eddie-mcclintock-e5959afec530.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/eddie-mcclintock-b302663242e4.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Eddie McClintock</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 18px;">Rayford Steele - Pilot:</strong></div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/colin-ferguson-78c09cc2c906.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/colin-ferguson-fa81867f494d.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Colin Ferguson</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tom-hanks-554c5ccc3544.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; display: inline !important; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/tom-hanks-9b34747aab58.jpg" width="153" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Tom Hanks</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Chloe Steele - Daughter:</strong><br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/allison-scagliotti-b5ac6860cf23.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/allison-scagliotti-2b050b096ca2.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Allison Scagliotti</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/jordan-hinson-19aba405342a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/jordan-hinson-d0ff6373efae.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Jordan Hinson</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Bruce Barnes - Left Behind Pastor:</strong></div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="line-height: 18px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/joe-morton-e48a71606a29.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/joe-morton-05c03d0950f5.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Joe Morton</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong><span style="font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif;"><span style="line-height: 1.4;">Chaim Rosenzweig -&nbsp;</span><span style="line-height: 18px;">Rabbi</span><span style="line-height: 1.4;">:</span></span></strong></div>
<div style="margin-bottom: 18px;">
<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/saul-rubinek-7da2a18ab33a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/saul-rubinek-cfcbc646325a.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Saul Rubinek</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Nicolae Carpathia - Anti Christ:</strong></div>
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/johnny-depp-fac65f4de2ca.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/johnny-depp-fac65f4de2ca.jpg" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Johnny Depp</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<div style="line-height: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Leonardo Fortunato - Anti Christ False Priest:</strong><br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/james-callis-ab00250c8297.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="139" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/james-callis-43272e27e277.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">James Callis</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Steve Plank - Reporters Boss:</strong></div>
</div>
<div style="font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="line-height: 18px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/richard-gere-421bc479cae4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/richard-gere-0864a18e0e5e.jpg" width="163" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Richard Gere</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<div style="line-height: 18px;">
<br /></div>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="line-height: 18px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sean-connery-5c821166b301.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sean-connery-1f545877c132.jpg" width="150" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Sean Connery</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<div style="line-height: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Dirk Burton - Conspiracy Theorist turns out right:</strong></div>
</div>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/shia-labeouf-55c26f0f3083.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="149" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/shia-labeouf-b9b6547ec2b8.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Shia Labeouf</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Hattie Durnham - Rayfords stewardess mistress:</strong><br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/angelina-jolie-573ab20d0cf4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/angelina-jolie-5463b49339ab.jpg" width="146" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Angelina Jolie</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/halle-berry-c8351cbc1147.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="149" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/halle-berry-070cfd8ed3f7.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Halle Berry</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<strong style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;"><br /></strong><br />
<div style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; line-height: 18px; margin-bottom: 18px;">
<strong style="font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Pastor Billings - Pastor who was raptured:</strong></div>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/t-d-jakes-1de582b11cd5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/t-d-jakes-7155051ab009.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">T D Jakes He was actually quite good for this role</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<strong style="color: #; font-family: Arial, 'Trebuchet MS', sans-serif; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1.4;">Johnathan Stoneagal and Joshua Cothran - Two who created Nicolae:</strong><br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rene-auberjonois-6e67ff7eb64f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rene-auberjonois-69cdbc3f2d76.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">&nbsp;Rene Auberjonois</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/jack-nicholson-4d62baa3e8ce.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/jack-nicholson-9f7e7b458804.jpg" width="149" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Jack Nicholson</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sir-ian-mckellen-17978e94d786.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sir-ian-mckellen-c5e19b5fbf05.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Sir Ian McKellen
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<b>I don't know which part but just because:</b><br />
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/christopher-lloyd-3dfd8618a84d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="185" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/christopher-lloyd-3a6d37ab042a.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Christopher Lloyd</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/george-clooney-567e2d7ed98e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/george-clooney-891df15ae738.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">George Clooney</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/matt-damon-893e0ae11add.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/matt-damon-519bcf1db857.jpg" width="149" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Matt Damon</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/richard-gere-7fce783ee23a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/richard-gere-c3d6bfb4f159.jpg" width="163" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Richard Gere</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sean-connery-841cce55697f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sean-connery-d9af391534af.jpg" width="150" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Sean Connery</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sir-ian-mckellen-17978e94d786.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/sir-ian-mckellen-c5e19b5fbf05.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Sir Ian McKellen</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/david-strathairn-fcaac4c41372.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="175" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/david-strathairn-574b96422cca.jpg" width="200" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">David Strathairn</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ryan-cartwright-18199b7a679e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/ryan-cartwright-99426ac8a895.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Ryan Cartwright</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/warren-christie-7a30d5c8730d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/warren-christie-5415f28aabce.jpg" width="136" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Warren Christie</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
Very Cool Casts to pool from:<br />
Eureka Cast:<br />
<a href="http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0796264/fullcredits">http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0796264/fullcredits</a>
<br />
Warehouse 13 Cast:<br />
<a href="http://www.imdb.com/title/tt1132290/fullcredits">http://www.imdb.com/title/tt1132290/fullcredits</a>
<br />
Alphas Cast:<br />
<a href="http://www.imdb.com/title/tt1183865/fullcredits">http://www.imdb.com/title/tt1183865/fullcredits</a>
<br />
<br />
